purpose: One-off convergence probe: is the logistic gap optimization-limited or capacity-limited?
caveat: Probe read the SAME temporal test split the adoption gate evaluates — that window is no longer selection-clean; see ADVANTAGE_MODEL.md gate caveat and the forward tuning rule.
conclusion: 1500@0.1 was underfit; plateau reached at 5000@0.3 (15000 changes nothing). Train loss equals test loss at the plateau, so the remaining gap to the heuristic is linear-capacity-limited, not overfitting or under-optimization.
